heading: Use of land and water conservation fund
label: 460nnn–122 Use of land and water conservation fund
notes: Amendments2014—Subsec. (a). substituted “” for “section 460–5 of this title”.Pub. L. 113–287section 200302 of title 54l
amendments: Amendments2014—Subsec. (a). substituted “” for “section 460–5 of this title”.Pub. L. 113–287section 200302 of title 54l

children.heading: Availability of fund
children.label: a Availability of fund
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated $25,000,000 from the land and water conservation fund established under to provide funds for the acquisition of land and interests in land under and to enter into nondevelopment easements and conservation easements under subsections (b) and (c) of .section 200302 of title 54section 460nnn–24 of this titlesection 460nnn–42 of this title

children.heading: Term of use
children.label: b Term of use
children.text: Amounts appropriated pursuant to the authorization of appropriations in subsection (a) shall remain available until expended.
